categories.name: Weight Loss & GLP-1
categories.description: Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound and other GLP-1 medications for weight management and type 2 diabetes.
categories.long_description: GLP-1 receptor agonists are the most prescribed weight-loss medications today. They work by slowing digestion and reducing appetite. Savings are complicated — most insurance plans don't cover GLP-1s for weight loss, and copay cards often have strict eligibility rules. We help you find every available option, from manufacturer programs to telehealth alternatives.
categories.meta_title: GLP-1 & Weight Loss Medication Savings | SaveRx.ai
categories.meta_description: Find the cheapest way to get Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound and other GLP-1 weight loss medications. Compare manufacturer programs, telehealth providers, and savings cards.

affiliate_cta.headline: Can't afford your GLP-1 medication?
affiliate_cta.body: Online telehealth providers prescribe GLP-1 medications for a fraction of retail — often without insurance. Compare Embody GLP1, Hims & Hers, Ro Body, and more.

categories.name: Diabetes
categories.description: Insulin, CGMs, and oral medications for Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes, including Jardiance, Farxiga, FreeStyle Libre, and more.
categories.long_description: Managing diabetes costs involves a complex mix of insulin, oral medications, and monitoring devices. Manufacturer savings programs can dramatically reduce costs — some programs offer $0 copay for sensors and meters, while insulin assistance programs can provide medication free of charge for qualifying patients. We track every current program so you don't have to.
categories.meta_title: Diabetes Medication Savings & Copay Programs | SaveRx.ai
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Jardiance, Farxiga, FreeStyle Libre, Januvia, Basaglar, and 20+ other diabetes medications. Compare copay cards, patient assistance, and insulin savings programs.

affiliate_cta.headline: Need help covering diabetes medication costs?
affiliate_cta.body: Many manufacturer patient assistance programs provide diabetes medications at no cost for qualifying patients. We can help you find and apply.

categories.name: Heart & Cholesterol
categories.description: Repatha, Praluent, Leqvio, Entresto, Eliquis, Xarelto and other cardiovascular medications for high cholesterol and heart conditions.
categories.long_description: Cardiovascular medications can cost thousands per year without assistance. PCSK9 inhibitors like Repatha and Praluent have compelling manufacturer savings programs, and anticoagulants like Eliquis and Xarelto have copay assistance for commercially insured patients. Finding the right program can mean the difference between $0 and $300 per fill.
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Repatha, Praluent, Entresto, Eliquis, Xarelto, Leqvio, and 12+ other cardiovascular medications. Compare manufacturer copay cards and patient assistance programs.

affiliate_cta.headline: Managing cardiovascular medication costs?
affiliate_cta.body: Manufacturer copay programs for heart medications can save you hundreds per month. Browse all current programs and eligibility requirements.

categories.name: Autoimmune & Inflammation
categories.description: Enbrel, Dupixent, Rinvoq, Tremfya, Taltz and other biologics for psoriasis, rheumatoid arthritis, Crohn's, and inflammatory conditions.
categories.long_description: Biologic medications for autoimmune conditions are among the most expensive drugs on the market — often $20,000–$80,000 per year at retail. But virtually every major biologic has a manufacturer copay card or PAP that can bring costs to $0–$5/month for commercially insured patients. The challenge is knowing where to find them and how to qualify.
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Dupixent, Enbrel, Rinvoq, Tremfya, Taltz, Otezla, and 18+ other biologic and autoimmune medications. Many programs offer $0 copay for eligible patients.

affiliate_cta.headline: Struggling with biologic medication costs?
affiliate_cta.body: Most biologic manufacturers offer $0 copay programs for commercially insured patients. For uninsured patients, patient assistance programs can provide medication free of charge.

categories.name: Migraine
categories.description: Nurtec, Aimovig, Emgality, Vyepti and other CGRP-based migraine prevention and acute treatment medications.
categories.long_description: CGRP antagonists and monoclonal antibodies have transformed migraine treatment, but they come with a steep price tag — $600–$1,000 per month at retail. Almost every drug in this category has a manufacturer free trial, copay card, or patient assistance program. Knowing which one is active and how to enroll is half the battle.
categories.meta_title: Migraine Medication Savings & Copay Cards | SaveRx.ai
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Nurtec, Aimovig, Emgality, Vyepti, Ubrelvy, Qulipta, Zavzpret and other CGRP migraine medications. Many offer free trials or $0 copay programs.

affiliate_cta.headline: High out-of-pocket costs for migraine medication?
affiliate_cta.body: Many CGRP migraine medications offer free 30-day trials or copay programs that bring your cost to $0 for the first month. Check eligibility now.

categories.name: Asthma & Respiratory
categories.description: Symbicort, Advair Diskus, Breo Ellipta, Trelegy, Dupixent and other inhalers and respiratory biologics for asthma and COPD.
categories.long_description: Respiratory medications — from daily inhalers to biologic add-ons — can cost $300–$800/month without coverage. Manufacturer savings programs are widely available for inhalers from AstraZeneca, GSK, and Boehringer Ingelheim, and biologics like Dupixent and Fasenra have robust copay assistance. Generic alternatives also exist for some conditions.
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Symbicort, Advair Diskus, Breo Ellipta, Trelegy, Fasenra, Dupixent, and other asthma and COPD medications. Compare manufacturer copay cards.

affiliate_cta.headline: Paying too much for your inhaler or respiratory biologic?
affiliate_cta.body: Most major inhaler brands offer savings cards that cap costs at $10–$35/month for commercially insured patients. Biologic programs can bring costs to $0.

categories.name: Mental Health
categories.description: Vyvanse, Trintellix, Rexulti, Auvelity, Spravato and other ADHD, depression, and anxiety medications.
categories.long_description: Mental health medications cover a wide spectrum — from ADHD treatments like Vyvanse to novel antidepressants like Auvelity and Spravato. Coverage varies widely by insurance plan, and many patients pay full price unnecessarily. Manufacturer savings programs are available on most branded drugs in this category, and patient assistance programs exist for uninsured patients.
categories.meta_title: Mental Health Medication Savings & Copay Programs | SaveRx.ai
categories.meta_description: Find official savings programs for Vyvanse, Trintellix, Rexulti, Auvelity, Spravato, Ingrezza, and other ADHD, depression, and anxiety medications. Compare manufacturer copay cards.

affiliate_cta.headline: Need help affording mental health medication?
affiliate_cta.body: Manufacturer programs and patient assistance can make branded mental health medications accessible. Many programs offer $0 copay for commercially insured or free medication for uninsured patients.
